g.title: CLL_Algorithm
g.text: CLL Treatment Decision Algorithm — BSH 2025 / NICE v1.9

g.title: WATCHANDWAIT
g.text: Repeat prognostic panel before treatment decision
Workup not required at diagnosis if asymptomatic

g.title: TP53_BLOCK
g.text: are not appropriate in this setting

g.title: RESPONSE
g.text: (MRD = additional assessment, not formal response category)

g.title: FIT_TX
g.text: BSH 2025 Preferred Order — All Fitness Levels
Ibrutinib 420 mg OD [TA429] (de-prioritised for new starts)

g.title: CONTINUE
g.text: Fixed-duration (Ven-Obi, Ibr+Ven): stop; monitor for relapse

g.title: RELAPSE
g.text: Suspect Richter's if: LDH ↑ + rapid asymmetric LAP

g.title: RICHTER
g.text: PET-CT + biopsy of most FDG-avid node
Clinical trial preferred (no standard of care)

g.title: RR_TX
g.text: Pirtobrutinib (BTKi C481S refractory — check NICE TA)
